data.title: ServiceNow University and MeasureUp partner to offer official practice tests for ServiceNow certifications worldwide.
data.description: ServiceNow University has recently partnered with MeasureUp to provide official practice tests for all ServiceNow certifications. This collaboration is set to enhance the certification process by offering professionals a more reliable and efficient pathway to achieving certification success. The agreement was announced in Miami on December 4, 2025. This collaboration marks a significant step towards standardizing and improving the certification process for individuals aiming to pursue ServiceNow certifications globally.

data.title: Lexington Manufacturing expands to Prineville, Oregon, enhancing its West Coast presence. Milestone in company's growth.
data.description: A company based in Coon Rapids, Minnesota, called Lexington Manufacturing, specializing in high-performance door and window components, has recently expanded into Prineville, Oregon. The move represents a significant milestone in the company's growth strategy as it aims to establish a presence in new markets. This expansion is expected to create employment opportunities and contribute to the local economy in Prineville.

data.title: Fox Advertising will hold 2026 upfront presentation on May 11 at NYC Center, featuring new premium content and ad tech.
data.description: The annual presentation for advertisers is scheduled for Monday, May 11 at the new location, the historic New York City Center. The event will feature a wide variety of original premium content from across the company's portfolio, as well as showcase the latest advancements in advertising technology. Tubi will host the IAB NewFront.

data.title: CIQ integrates Fuzzball with PBS Pro and Slurm, offers container orchestration for HPC, preserving existing workflows.
data.description: A recent introduction now enables businesses to utilize Fuzzball's container orchestration while maintaining current scheduler processes and operational investments. This offering comes from CIQ, the original support and services collaborator of Rocky Linux and a prominent figure in the industry. The development was announced in Reno, Nevada on December 4, 2025.
The US to sell $22 bln reopened 30-Year bond on December 11, to settle on December 15.

data.title: ER in Lufkin changes name but remains at 501 N Brentwood Dr, offering 24-hour care in Texas.
data.description: In Lufkin, Texas, on December 4, 2025, the signage for the 24-hour emergency room located at 501 N Brentwood Drive, near Sam's Club on Highway 59, has been updated. The new sign is catching the attention of passersby due to its distinct appearance.

data.title: LangChain discusses evaluating Deep Agents, developing four apps and testing methods to ensure functionality. Learn more.
data.description: LangChain recently shared insights into evaluating Deep Agents, discussing the creation of four applications and the testing strategies used to guarantee performance. Through the development process, LangChain leveraged various testing patterns to confirm functionality. For more details, visit the source link.

data.title: By 2032, Healthcare Marketing & Communications market to reach $43.26 billion valuation due to digital transformation.
data.description: A report titled "Healthcare Marketing & Communications Market - Global Forecast 2025-2032" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The healthcare marketing and communications market is experiencing significant growth, propelled by increasingly stringent regulations and the ever-changing digital landscape. With senior decision-makers encountering growing compliance challenges and diverse stakeholder requirements, the adoption of agile and integrated marketing strategies is crucial for maintaining effective engagement. This market is projected to see continued evolution and expansion in the coming years.

data.title: Investors of Skye Bioscience urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP by Oct 3, 2025 for losses suffered between Nov 4, 2024 to Oct 3, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Skye to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Skye within the period from November 4, 2024, to October 3, 2025, and wish to engage in a discussion regarding this matter, please get in touch.

data.title: Investor deadline nears: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates aTyr Pharma, investors with losses urged to contact by Sep 12.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who incurred losses in aTyr to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in aTyr within the period from January 16, 2025, to September 12, 2025, and are interested in discussing further, please contact him.

data.title: PMGC Holdings congratulates General Enterprise Ventures on uplisting to NYSE American, emphasizes equity stake.
data.description: PMGC Holdings Inc. celebrates General Enterprise Ventures, Inc.'s successful uplisting to NYSE American from Nasdaq. General Enterprise Ventures, trading now under NYSE: CITR, marks this milestone. PMGC commends the move, emphasizing the equity status enhancement.
